columns.extraction_plan: Extract the interaction Hazard Ratio (HR) and its 95% confidence interval and p-value, which compares the treatment effect between the abiraterone trial and the abiraterone and enzalutamide trial, as reported in the 'Findings' section on page 1. The value is 'HR 1·05 (95% CI 0·83–1·32); pinteraction=0·71'.
